biological_replicate: a dose of 5 × 107 cells was inoculated into 12 male and 12 female mice.
technical_replicate: allowing CFU counts to determine the initial inoculum density.
experimental_design: In a murine model of systemic infection, treated mice displayed improved clinical condition.
factor_value: the efficacy of Ca37, a monoclonal antibody (mAb) targeting the alcohol dehydrogenase (Adh) protein of Candida albicans, against C. auris.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
